The health benefits of Mesembryanthemum crystallinum include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, reducing water retention and alleviating conditions such as edema and hypertension. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, glycosides, and betalains, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties.
